summary: Iteration 10: Responsive Vehicle Card Layout Testing - All 8 test scenarios PASSED. Vehicle cards display full-width (90% viewport) in single column on mobile (400x800) and 3 cards per row (371px each) on desktop (1920x800). Détails button visible and clickable on both viewports.

test_1_mobile_homepage_single_column.details: Homepage vehicle cards display in single column on mobile (400x800). Grid container has flexDirection: column, gap: 14px.

test_2_mobile_homepage_full_width_cards.details: Mobile vehicle cards are 360px wide = 90% of 400px viewport. Card images fill the full card width.

test_3_desktop_homepage_3_columns.details: Desktop (1920x800) shows exactly 3 cards per row. Grid container has flexDirection: row, flexWrap: wrap. First 3 cards at X=380, X=767, X=1154 (Y variance 0px).

test_4_desktop_card_widths.details: Desktop cards are 371px wide (maxWidth: 380px). Large images visible with proper aspect ratio 1.5.

test_5_mobile_vehicles_page.details: Vehicles page (/vehicles) has same full-width single-column layout on mobile. Cards 360px wide, stacked vertically.

test_6_desktop_vehicles_page.details: Vehicles page shows 3 columns on desktop. Cards positioned at X=380, 767, 1154 with 16px gap.

test_7_mobile_details_button.details: Détails button visible and clickable on mobile. Navigated to /vehicle/{id} successfully.

test_8_desktop_card_info_readability.details: All vehicle card info readable: Price (CHF 65) at 22px/800 weight, Brand (VOLKSWAGEN) at 11px purple, Specs (5 Places, Manuel, Essence) clearly visible. Colors: price rgb(26,26,46), brand rgb(107,33,168).

desktop_1920x800.grid_container: flexDirection: row, flexWrap: wrap, width: 1200px, gap: 16px

seed_data_used: 11 existing vehicles in database (Volkswagen Golf, Renault Kangoo, Tesla Model 3, Porsche Cayenne, Fiat 500, Range Rover Sport, Mercedes Sprinter, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive vehicle card layout fully functional: VehicleCard.tsx uses useWindowDimensions() to apply isMobile styles (width < 768). Mobile cards get maxWidth: 100% and imageAspectRatio: 1.4. Desktop cards get maxWidth: 380px and imageAspectRatio: 1.5. Grid container in index.tsx and vehicles.tsx uses flexDirection: column on mobile, flexDirection: row with flexWrap on desktop. Each desktop card wrapper has width: '32%' for 3-column layout.

test_evidence.mobile_homepage: Cards 360px wide (90%), single column, gap 14px, flexDirection: column
test_evidence.desktop_homepage: 3 cards per row at X=380,767,1154, width 371px, Y variance 0px
test_evidence.mobile_vehicles_page: Same layout as homepage - full-width single column
test_evidence.card_info: Price 22px/800weight, Brand 11px purple, Specs visible in chips
